# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        choice(
            name: 'PROJECT_TYPE',
            choices: ['java', 'python', 'nodejs', 'go', 'custom'],
            description: 'Select the project type for default build configurations'
        )
        string(
            name: 'BRANCH_NAME',
            defaultValue: 'main',
            description: 'Git branch to build'
        )
        string(
            name: 'REPO_URL',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Git repository URL (leave empty to use workspace)'
        )
        text(
            name: 'SETUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Setup/initialization commands (executed before build). One command per line.'
        )
        text(
            name: 'BUILD_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom build commands. One command per line. Leave empty for default based on project type.'
        )
        text(
            name: 'TEST_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Custom test commands. One command per line. Leave empty for default based on project type.'
        )
        text(
            name: 'CODE_ANALYSIS_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Static code analysis or linting commands. One command per line.'
        )
        text(
            name: 'PACKAGE_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Packaging/artifact creation commands. One command per line.'
        )
        text(
            name: 'DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Deployment commands. One command per line. Leave empty to skip deployment.'
        )
        text(
            name: 'POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Post-deployment verification commands (health checks, smoke tests). One command per line.'
        )
        text(
            name: 'CLEANUP_COMMANDS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Cleanup commands to run after pipeline completion. One command per line.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'ARTIFACTS_PATTERN',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Artifact file pattern to archive (e.g., target/*.jar, dist/**/*.zip). Leave empty to skip.'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TEST_RESULTS_PATTERN',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Test results pattern for JUnit (e.g., **/test-results/*.xml). Leave empty to skip.'
        )
        choice(
            name: 'DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT',
            choices: ['none', 'dev', 'staging', 'production'],
            description: 'Target deployment environment'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_TESTS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip test execution'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'SKIP_CODE_ANALYSIS',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Skip code analysis stage'
        )
        booleanParam(
            name: 'DRY_RUN',
            defaultValue: false,
            description: 'Dry run mode - print commands without executing them'
        )
        text(
            name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARS',
            defaultValue: '',
            description: 'Environment variables in KEY=VALUE format, one per line'
        )
        string(
            name: 'TIMEOUT_MINUTES',
            defaultValue: '60',
            description: 'Pipeline timeout in minutes'
        )
    }

    environment {
        PROJECT_TYPE = "${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
        DEPLOY_ENV = "${params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}"
        DRY_RUN = "${params.DRY_RUN}"
    }

    options {
        timeout(time: "${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES ?: '60'}".toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
    }

    stages {
        stage('Initialize') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "========================================="
                    echo "Pipeline Configuration Summary"
                    echo "========================================="
                    echo "Project Type:       ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    echo "Branch:             ${params.BRANCH_NAME}"
                    echo "Deploy Environment: ${params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}"
                    echo "Skip Tests:         ${params.SKIP_TESTS}"
                    echo "Skip Code Analysis: ${params.SKIP_CODE_ANALYSIS}"
                    echo "Dry Run:            ${params.DRY_RUN}"
                    echo "Timeout:            ${params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES} minutes"
                    echo "========================================="

                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS?.trim()) {
                        echo "Setting custom environment variables..."
                        params.ENVIRONMENT_VARS.trim().split('\n').each { line ->
                            line = line.trim()
                            if (line && line.contains('=')) {
                                def parts = line.split('=', 2)
                                env."${parts[0].trim()}" = parts[1].trim()
                                echo "  Set: ${parts[0].trim()}=****"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Checkout') {
            when {
                expression { return params.REPO_URL?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Checking out ${params.REPO_URL} branch ${params.BRANCH_NAME}"
                    if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                        echo "[DRY RUN] git clone -b ${params.BRANCH_NAME} ${params.REPO_URL}"
                    } else {
                        checkout([
                            $class: 'GitSCM',
                            branches: [[name: "*/${params.BRANCH_NAME}"]],
                            userRemoteConfigs: [[url: params.REPO_URL]]
                        ])
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Setup') {
            when {
                expression { return params.SETUP_COMMANDS?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running setup commands..."
                    executeCommands(params.SETUP_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def commands = params.BUILD_COMMANDS?.trim()
                    if (!commands) {
                        commands = getDefaultBuildCommands(params.PROJECT_TYPE)
                        echo "Using default build commands for project type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    }
                    if (commands) {
                        echo "Running build commands..."
                        executeCommands(commands)
                    } else {
                        echo "No build commands configured. Skipping."
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Code Analysis') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_CODE_ANALYSIS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def commands = params.CODE_ANALYSIS_COMMANDS?.trim()
                    if (!commands) {
                        commands = getDefaultAnalysisCommands(params.PROJECT_TYPE)
                        echo "Using default code analysis commands for project type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    }
                    if (commands) {
                        echo "Running code analysis commands..."
                        executeCommands(commands)
                    } else {
                        echo "No code analysis commands configured. Skipping."
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { return !params.SKIP_TESTS }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def commands = params.TEST_COMMANDS?.trim()
                    if (!commands) {
                        commands = getDefaultTestCommands(params.PROJECT_TYPE)
                        echo "Using default test commands for project type: ${params.PROJECT_TYPE}"
                    }
                    if (commands) {
                        echo "Running test commands..."
                        executeCommands(commands)
                    } else {
                        echo "No test commands configured. Skipping."
                    }
                }
            }
            post {
                always {
                    script {
                        if (params.TEST_RESULTS_PATTERN?.trim()) {
                            echo "Collecting test results: ${params.TEST_RESULTS_PATTERN}"
                            junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: params.TEST_RESULTS_PATTERN
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Package') {
            when {
                expression { return params.PACKAGE_COMMANDS?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running package commands..."
                    executeCommands(params.PACKAGE_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy Approval') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { return params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT == 'production' }
                    expression { return params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS?.trim() }
                    expression { return !params.DRY_RUN }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Production deployment requires manual approval."
                    input(
                        message: "Deploy to PRODUCTION environment?",
                        ok: "Approve Deployment",
                        submitter: "admin,release-managers",
                        parameters: [
                            string(
                                name: 'APPROVAL_NOTE',
                                defaultValue: '',
                                description: 'Optional: Add a note for this deployment approval'
                            )
                        ]
                    )
                    echo "Production deployment approved."
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { return params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT != 'none' }
                    expression { return params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS?.trim() }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Deploying to ${params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT} environment..."
                    executeCommands(params.DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Post-Deploy Verification') {
            when {
                allOf {
                    expression { return params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT != 'none' }
                    expression { return params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS?.trim() }
                }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Running post-deployment verification..."
                    executeCommands(params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMANDS)
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Archive Artifacts') {
            when {
                expression { return params.ARTIFACTS_PATTERN?.trim() }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Archiving artifacts matching: ${params.ARTIFACTS_PATTERN}"
                    if (!params.DRY_RUN) {
                        archiveArtifacts artifacts: params.ARTIFACTS_PATTERN, allowEmptyArchive: true, fingerprint: true
                    } else {
                        echo "[DRY RUN] Would archive: ${params.ARTIFACTS_PATTERN}"
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            script {
                if (params.CLEANUP_COMMANDS?.trim()) {
                    echo "Running cleanup commands..."
                    executeCommands(params.CLEANUP_COMMANDS)
                }
                echo "========================================="
                echo "Pipeline Result: ${currentBuild.currentResult}"
                echo "Duration: ${currentBuild.durationString}"
                echo "========================================="
            }
        }
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed. Please check the logs for details."
        }
        unstable {
            echo "Pipeline completed with unstable status. Check test results."
        }
    }
}

def executeCommands(String commandBlock) {
    if (!commandBlock?.trim()) {
        echo "No commands to execute."
        return
    }

    def commands = commandBlock.trim().split('\n')
    commands.each { cmd ->
        cmd = cmd.trim()
        if (cmd && !cmd.startsWith('#')) {
            if (params.DRY_RUN) {
                echo "[DRY RUN] ${cmd}"
            } else {
                echo "Executing: ${cmd}"
                sh(script: cmd, returnStatus: false)
            }
        } else if (cmd.startsWith('#')) {
            echo "Comment: ${cmd}"
        }
    }
}

def getDefaultBuildCommands(String projectType) {
    switch (projectType) {
        case 'java':
            return 'mvn clean compile -B'
        case 'python':
            return '''python -m venv venv || true
. venv/bin/activate || true
pip install -r requirements.txt'''
        case 'nodejs':
            return '''npm ci || npm install
npm run build --if-present'''
        case 'go':
            return '''go mod download
go build ./...'''
        case 'custom':
            return ''
        default:
            return ''
    }
}

def getDefaultTestCommands(String projectType) {
    switch (projectType) {
        case 'java':
            return 'mvn test -B'
        case 'python':
            return '''. venv/bin/activate || true
python -m pytest tests/ --junitxml=test-results/results.xml -v'''
        case 'nodejs':
            return 'npm test'
        case 'go':
            return 'go test ./... -v -coverprofile=coverage.out'
        case 'custom':
            return ''
        default:
            return ''
    }
}

def getDefaultAnalysisCommands(String projectType) {
    switch (projectType) {
        case 'java':
            return 'mvn checkstyle:check -B || true'
        case 'python':
            return '''. venv/bin/activate || true
pip install flake8 || true
flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics || true
flake8 . --count --max-complexity=10 --max-line-length=127 --statistics || true'''
        case 'nodejs':
            return 'npm run lint --if-present || true'
        case 'go':
            return '''go vet ./... || true
golint ./... || true'''
        case 'custom':
            return ''
        default:
            return ''
    }
}
